goal: Founder corrections on the coin/shop batch: stop over-granting achievement coins, close the shop, show only owned decks in Your Decks, and swap the Ask nav tab for Shop
done: (1) Achievement coins now fire ONLY on a real DECK unlock, not on the generic micro-achievements. Founder saw '3 achievements unlocked' (+60 coins) on first login because evaluateAchievements() unlocks several at once (first card = a reversed major arcana -> first_daily + first_reversed + first_major_arcana) and the new earn-popup made it visible. progress.js no longer calls grantAchievementCoins per newlyUnlocked key; only newlyUnlockedDecks -> grantDeckUnlockCoins (+20). Micro-achievements remain as badges. (2) Shop CLOSED: every deck in DECKS is already free via another path (moonmallow=default, veila-tarot=sign-in reward, rest=streak/day rewards), so none belong in the shop -> set SHOP_DECKS=[] in js/shop.js (honest 'coming soon'). Shop is reserved for future shop-EXCLUSIVE decks; purchaseDeck/canUnlockDeck plumbing kept. (3) 'Your decks' (js/decks.js renderAll) now renders only unlockedDecks (canUnlockDeck true) instead of all decks-with-lock-badges; the X-of-N status pill still counts all. (4) Bottom-nav 3rd tab Ask->Shop (js/bottom-nav.js): label Ask/ถาม -> Shop/ร้านค้า, href question.html -> shop.html, new shopping-bag-with-cat-ears icon, active on /shop.html. Cache-bust ?v=20260621b -> 20260621c across all HTML; www mirror synced.
root_cause: Achievement coins were keyed to every micro-achievement (several fire on reading #1); the shop was populated with decks already obtainable free; Your Decks listed locked decks; the 3rd nav tab pointed at Ask.
fix: Tie +20 to deck unlocks only; empty SHOP_DECKS; filter Your Decks to owned; repoint nav tab to Shop.
verified: headless shop.html: 'coming soon' state, no decks shown
